How it works

From WhatsApp to done — in one day.

No app. No complicated booking. Just send us a message.

01
📋
Build your list
Select your services above. We'll prep a pre-filled WhatsApp message with everything you need.
02
💬
WhatsApp us
One message. We confirm your booking, timing, and any details in under 10 minutes.
03
📸
We handle it
Your runner heads out. You get a WhatsApp photo at collection and at delivery. Always.
04
✅
Done. You're free.
Signed receipt sent to you. Your afternoon is yours. No queues. No traffic. No stress.

Our promise to you
Your first errand — fully guaranteed.
